records.ety: [L. nutrimentum, fr. nutrire to nourish. See Nourish.]

defs: That which nourishes; a nutrient; anything which promotes growth and repairs the natural waste of animal or vegetable life; food; aliment.
quotes: The stomach returns what it has received, in strength and nutriment diffused into all parts of the body.

defs: That which promotes development or growth.
quotes: Is not virtue in mankind The nutriment that feeds the mind?
